/home/runner/work/peak/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -static-libgcc -Wl,-z,noexecstack,--gc-sections -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/peak.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libpeak.so -o libpeak.so CMakeFiles/peak.dir/dlopen_interceptor.c.o CMakeFiles/peak.dir/general_listener.c.o CMakeFiles/peak.dir/malloc_interceptor.c.o CMakeFiles/peak.dir/peak.c.o CMakeFiles/peak.dir/pthread_listener.c.o CMakeFiles/peak.dir/syscall_interceptor.c.o utils/CMakeFiles/utils_c.dir/env_parser.c.o utils/CMakeFiles/utils_c.dir/mpi_utils.c.o utils/CMakeFiles/utils_c.dir/source_target.c.o utils/CMakeFiles/utils_c.dir/utils.c.o utils/CMakeFiles/utils_cxx.dir/cxx_utils.cpp.o  ../frida-gum/libfrida-gum.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libresolv.so -lm
